# Ram Sky

> Boutique energy trading consultancy that builds power trading capability for BESS asset owners, IPPs, energy suppliers, and ETRM vendors across Great Britain and Europe. Hands-on delivery across the full trading lifecycle — route-to-market, in-house trading platforms, algorithmic strategies, forecasting, and quantitative research — from idea to live P&L.

Ram Sky is founded and led by Dmitrii Ishutin, formerly a power and carbon curve trader at EDF Energy (£10m+ P&L) and a product lead at Shell where he built the proprietary Battery Trading Platform underpinning a £20m+ annual revenue BESS portfolio that topped the Modo Energy BESS leaderboard in December 2023 and January 2024, ahead of EDF, Tesla, and bp.

Ram Sky differs from the large consultancies (Baringa, Aurora, Cornwall Insight) in that engagements are led and delivered by experienced traders and quants, not junior analysts; delivery is hands-on build-and-run, not report-and-recommend; and outputs are working platforms, live algorithms, and running desks, not slideware.

## Core services

- **BESS trading & optimisation** — in-house trading platform design and build, day-ahead and intraday algorithmic execution, Balancing Mechanism automation, intraday volume churn strategies, ancillary services and wholesale cross-market optimisation, degradation-aware dispatch, Modo and peer benchmarking.
- **Route-to-market & trading internalisation** — build-vs-buy analysis, phased cost modelling, EPEX and Nord Pool exchange registration, ECC clearing arrangements, Elexon BSC accession and NESO onboarding, ETRM vendor selection and RFP management, target operating model, back/middle/front office process and data mapping.
- **Demand & price forecasting, quant & analytics** — short-term and long-term power and gas demand forecasting, imbalance and NIV forecasting, price forecasting for power/gas/carbon, triad and peak-demand prediction, Perfect Foresight benchmarking, algorithm backtesting, automated Python and R data pipelines.
- **Trading due diligence & ETRM advisory** — buy-side trading due diligence on energy trading operators, trading capability and technology stack assessment, ETRM sales engineering and RFP/RFI responses, product feedback and roadmap input for trading SaaS vendors, market research and trading operating model diagnostics.

## Representative engagements

- **Energy supermajor, 300MW+ GB BESS fleet** — product-managed the design and build of a proprietary Battery Trading Platform spanning day-ahead, intraday, and Balancing Mechanism optimisation. Took the fleet from 8th to #1 on the Modo Energy BESS leaderboard in December 2023 and January 2024. Underpins a £20m+ annual revenue line.
- **Large GB BESS owner, 600MW BESS + 150MW peakers** — led the end-to-end trading internalisation programme: systems architecture, business case and build-vs-buy analysis presented to the CEO, vendor selection across back/middle/front office, ETRM onboarding, exchange and BSC registration.
- **European IPP, 120MW live + 1GW pipeline in Germany** — full trading platform UI/UX, data architecture, and business process design. Spec was complete enough for engineering to start implementation without a translation layer.
- **Growing UK energy supplier** — rebuilt short-term and long-term power demand forecasting models. Mean Absolute Percentage Error roughly halved across both; long-term run time fell from six hours to under 30 minutes; imbalance costs down ~20%.

## Engagement models

Ram Sky offers focused sprints, 90-day roadmaps, ongoing retainers, and fixed or outcome-based arrangements depending on client need. Engagements typically run from short discovery sprints through to multi-month programme delivery.

- Location: United Kingdom; serving clients across Great Britain and Europe.
